houses.name: Snowy's Diner with sign
houses.notes: TWO-PIECE SET: includes a lit building and light-up sign accessory figurine, both hand-crafted from porcelain material and hand-painted. Set of 2 includes roadside sign.

Hillside action can be viewed from the upper story balconies.

accessories.name: Cocoa Chocolate Works
accessories.notes: The very best candy is made from rich, sweet North Pole chocolate produced at the "Cocoa Chocolate Works" right in the middle of North Pole Village... An elfin chef diligently pours the molten brown liquid into the vat where it is molded into images of Santa... As the candy emerges on the conveyor belt, a second chef bites the head from each piece... What fun it would be to spend an hour in the alley just outside the back door where all the "rejects" are stacked up in the snow... YUMMY...
accessories.description: The very best candy is made from rich, sweet North Pole chocolate produced at the "Cocoa Chocolate Works" right in the middle of North Pole Village... An elfin chef diligently pours the molten brown liquid into the vat where it is molded into images of Santa... As the candy emerges on the conveyor belt, a second chef bites the head from each piece... What fun it would be to spend an hour in the alley just outside the back door where all the "rejects" are stacked up in the snow... YUMMY...

accessories.name: Passing Inspection with Flying Colors
accessories.notes: Passing Inspection with Flying Colors. - "Alfie's Toy School For Elves". This early release has a different color scheme than the 2nd release.. Includes gold accents, and "A" initial weathervane.. On November 15, 2004 Department 56 released this set of buildings one piece at a time throughout 2004 and 2005 to celebrate 15 years of their North Pole Series. When displayed together their weathervanes spell SANTA . By December 31, 2005, every building had been retired. First of the five buildings is Santa's Toy Company . This piece is the Early Release Numbered Limited Edition that was offered by Department 56 exclusively through selected dealers. It is one of 10,000 and has a gold spire as opposed to the later retail release of this building with the blue spire. The second of the five buildings is Alfie's Toy School for Elves . This piece is also an Early Release edition that was offered by Department 56 exclusively online and no w else. It is also one of 10,000 that has a blue roof as opposed to the later retail release of this building with the green roof. The third piece is Nettie's Mistletoe Manor . This piece was the first retail piece released in 2005. The fourth piece is Tinker's Caboose Cafe . The fifth of the five buildings is called Art's Hobbies & Crafts .
accessories.description: Passing Inspection with Flying Colors

accessories.name: Everybody’s Been Good This Year!
accessories.notes: Everybody's Been Good This Year!. Santa’s Toy Company - Early Release. Limited Edition, numbered porcelain lighted building. Commemorates the 15th anniversary of North Pole Village.. This is the first building in a series that spells out "Santa.. Department 56 North Pole Series.. On November 15, 2004 Department 56 released this set of buildings one piece at a time throughout 2004 and 2005 to celebrate 15 years of their North Pole Series. When displayed together their weathervanes spell SANTA . By December 31, 2005, every building had been retired. First of the five buildings is Santa's Toy Company . This piece is the Early Release Numbered Limited Edition that was offered by Department 56 exclusively through selected dealers. It is one of 10,000 and has a gold spire as opposed to the later retail release of this building with the blue spire. The second of the five buildings is Alfie's Toy School for Elves . This piece is also an Early Release edition that was offered by Department 56 exclusively online and no w else. It is also one of 10,000 that has a blue roof as opposed to the later retail release of this building with the green roof. The third piece is Nettie's Mistletoe Manor . This piece was the first retail piece released in 2005. The fourth piece is Tinker's Caboose Cafe . The fifth of the five buildings is called Art's Hobbies & Crafts .
